current_extraction.notes: Source PDF (NIST AI 100-1) marker-extracted to markdown. extract_ai_rmf.py walks the AI RMF Core tables to produce per-subcategory structured CSV/JSON (72 subcategories across 4 Functions: 19 Govern, 18 Map, 22 Measure, 13 Manage).
